generated_exposure.exposure_text: I've been thinking about civil defense preparedness lately. It's scary how unprepared we are for real threats. My neighbor's son is in the National Guard, and even he says local communities need better emergency plans. We can't just rely on the government to handle everything. What if there's a major disaster and help doesn't arrive in time? We should push for more community-based preparedness programs. It's not about fear - it's about being responsible and looking out for each other. #CommunityPreparedness #SafetyFirst
